creator: rodrigo.freebsd@minasambiente.com.br
text: Hello. Installed again (fresh install) from FreeBSD-12.0-RELEASE-amd64-disc1.iso (MD5 9d3d2933390400918736fcdf46825ee3)in VirutalBox with same error result. Installed two times, one with default IDE controller other with SATA controller, both tries resulted with same broken boot. Installed with default installer options except scheme, choosing BSD disk label (entire disk). Windows10 Guest and VirtualBox 5.2.18 r124319(Qt5.6.2). I exported the appliance (.ova) so tell me if have interest. Unfortunately my internet is very, very bad atm (not at home) but I can try uploading (850Mb).
